html:
Exclusive to:

The Steering Wheel Kit is a craftable Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It is found in the Seafaring Filter, requires two Boards and a Rope to craft, and a Think Tank to prototype.

Steering Wheel Kit

The Steering Wheel Kit can be deployed on a Boat. The Steering Wheel then allows players to steer the Boat if one or several Masts have been placed on it.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Loyal Skittersquid Helm skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch from September 9, 2021 to September 23, 2021.
  • The Proof of Purchase Arc Welded Helm skin is obtained by purchasing the Nendoroid Wilson Figure.
Woven - Elegant
Wagstaff Collection
Hydraulic Steering System
One must stay the course, in the name of progress.
Loyal
Nautical Collection
Skittersquid Helm
It never hurts to keep an extra eye out on the ocean.
Proof of Purchase
Arc Welded Helm
Steer with the current!

Trivia

  • The Steering Wheel Kit was introduced in the Turn of Tides update.
  • Prior to Hotfix 740477, the Arc Welded Helm was called the Tesla Coil Helm.

Gallery

  • A burnt Steering Wheel.
DSTDSRoGSWHam
plainText:
Exclusive to:
Steering Wheel
Object Info
Perk
Can be used to steer a Boat with a Mast.
Can be Burned
Source
Can be Hammered
Miscellaneous
"steeringwheel"
“I could have been a sailor in another life.”
–Wilson, examining a Steering Wheel.
“Check out how fast I can spin it!!”
–Willow, examining a Steering Wheel.
“Wolfgang does not know where he is going.”
–Wolfgang, examining a Steering Wheel.
“Yet still I am directionless.”
–Wendy, examining a Steering Wheel.
“BOATS ARE HORRIBLE”
–WX-78, examining a Steering Wheel.
“Ship steering is no easy task.”
–Wickerbottom, examining a Steering Wheel.
“I like to know where I'm going.”
–Woodie, examining a Steering Wheel.
“Why yes, you may call me the "Captain".”
–Maxwell, examining a Steering Wheel.
“Njörd guide öur jöurney.”
–Wigfrid, examining a Steering Wheel.
“Oh, oh, we want to steer!”
–Webber, examining a Steering Wheel.
“I'll steer us in the right direction!”
–Warly, examining a Steering Wheel.
“Which way?”
–Wormwood, examining a Steering Wheel.
“I'm ready for a sea adventure.”
–Winona, examining a Steering Wheel.
“A big wheel to guide a keel.”
–Wortox, examining a Steering Wheel.
“Wurt is captain!!”
–Wurt, examining a Steering Wheel.
“Come on First Mate Woby, we're going sailing!”
–Walter, examining a Steering Wheel.
“My poor hands are going to get callouses from all this sea-faring.”
–Wanda, examining a Steering Wheel.
The Steering Wheel Kit is a craftable Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It is found in the Seafaring Filter, requires two Boards and a Rope to craft, and a Think Tank to prototype.
Steering Wheel Kit[edit | edit source]
Steering Wheel Kit
"It's wheely important to have one."
Object Info
Perk
Can be placed as a Structure.
3 min.
Can be Burned
Does not stack
Crafting
×2 ×1
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
"steeringwheel_item"
“That's going to be the steering wheel.”
–Wilson, examining a Steering Wheel Kit.
“Can't sail without that.”
–Willow, examining a Steering Wheel Kit.
“Is for making little whirly steer-wheel.”
–Wolfgang, examining a Steering Wheel Kit.
“It would make a steering wheel...”
–Wendy, examining a Steering Wheel Kit.
“FOR BUILDING AN AWFUL STEERING WHEEL”
–WX-78, examining a Steering Wheel Kit.
“A necessity should we want to steer out boat.”
–Wickerbottom, examining a Steering Wheel Kit.
“We should set up the base of the boat first.”
–Woodie, examining a Steering Wheel Kit.
“Hard labor? Isn't that Winona's forte?”
–Maxwell, examining a Steering Wheel Kit.
“A vital piece öf glöriöus vessel.”
–Wigfrid, examining a Steering Wheel Kit.
“That's for making a steering wheel.”
–Webber, examining a Steering Wheel Kit.
“We can't set sail without this.”
–Warly, examining a Steering Wheel Kit.
“For pointing floaty”
–Wormwood, examining a Steering Wheel Kit.
“That steering wheel ain't gonna assemble itself.”
–Winona, examining a Steering Wheel Kit.
“I can see the appeal of a steering wheel.”
–Wortox, examining a Steering Wheel Kit.
“This go on boat?”
–Wurt, examining a Steering Wheel Kit.
“It's probably a good idea to add a steering wheel.”
–Walter, examining a Steering Wheel Kit.
“I hope I don't forget to add that to the boat.”
–Wanda, examining a Steering Wheel Kit.
The Steering Wheel Kit can be deployed on a Boat. The Steering Wheel then allows players to steer the Boat if one or several Masts have been placed on it.
Skins[edit | edit source]
Main article: Belongings
The Loyal Skittersquid Helm skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch from September 9, 2021 to September 23, 2021.
The Proof of Purchase Arc Welded Helm skin is obtained by purchasing the Nendoroid Wilson Figure.
Woven - Elegant
Wagstaff Collection
Hydraulic Steering System
One must stay the course, in the name of progress.
Loyal
Nautical Collection
Skittersquid Helm
It never hurts to keep an extra eye out on the ocean.
Proof of Purchase
Arc Welded Helm
Steer with the current!
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Steering Wheel Kit was introduced in the Turn of Tides update.
Prior to Hotfix 740477, the Arc Welded Helm was called the Tesla Coil Helm.

A burnt Steering Wheel.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Bộ Vô Lăng là một Vật phẩm có thể chế tạo độc quyền cho Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong Return of Them. Nó được tìm thấy trong Bộ Lọc Đi Biển, cần hai Ván Ván và một Dây Thừng để chế tạo, và một Think Tank để tạo nguyên mẫu.
title: Steering Wheel
